title: paul russells 20W LED Outdoor Floodlight - 2000LM Bright Security Lights, IP65 Waterproof, Daylight 6500K White, Garden & Outdoor Wall Lights for Garden, Garage Lighting, Warehouse, Energy-Efficient
features: ◑ Energy-Efficient Lighting: Paul Russells 20W LED floodlight is a powerhouse of Bright Light, saving over 85% on electricity bills compared to traditional 150W incandescent bulbs.

◑ Super Bright Illumination: With an impressive 6500K Daylight and 2000LM output, this security light will effectively light up your entire garden courtyard, Garage, Warehouse or any other place where you need bright light.
◑ No Motion Sensor: Please note that this is a standard LED floodlight, perfect for consistent, reliable lighting.

◑ Versatile Installation: Featuring a 180-degree adjustable bracket angle, you can install it on the ceiling, wall, or the ground. Adjust the projection surface to any angle for your specific lighting needs. Please read the instruction manual before starting fitting.

◑ Weatherproof Durability: Crafted from die-cast aluminium and tempered glass with an IP65 rating and IK05, this floodlight is rust-proof and designed to withstand the elements. It's ideal for gardens, courtyards, plazas, and piers.
description: Product Description Package List: 1x Paul Russells LED Floodlight 1x Screw Accessory 1x Installation Guide Paul Russells LEDs where outdoor lighting becomes an art form. With meticulous design and manufacturing, we deliver unparalleled charm in every product. Elevate your space with our first-class lighting solutions. Paul Russells LED Outdoor Security Floodlight [without sensor] * Input: AC 200-240V 50/60Hz * Waterproof rate: IP65 * Beam angle: 110° * Lifespan: 25,000hrs * Colour Temperature: 6500K (Daylight White) * Ultra-thin Design * Efficient Heat Dissipation

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Bright Security Light, Easy Installation, Flicker Free, IP65 Protection, Up To 85% Energy Savings
